author: huynhtranhoanglong
description: Automatically prefix new note names with today's date. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Long Hoang
manifest.description: Automatically prefix new note names with today's date.
manifest.name: Datestamp

name: Datestamp

releases.author: huynhtranhoanglong
releases.description:
## Fixes
- Remove settings heading per Obsidian guidelines (no plugin name or "settings" word in headings)

releases.author: huynhtranhoanglong
releases.description:
## Fixes
- Add void operator for unhandled promise in create event handler
- - Refactor setTimeout to Promise-based delay with await
- - Replace createEl('h2'/'h3') with Setting().setHeading()
- - Remove unused previewEl variable
These changes address all required issues from ObsidianReviewBot.

releases.author: huynhtranhoanglong
releases.description:
## Features
- Automatically prefix new notes with today's date
- Customizable date format, separator, and default name
- Compatible with Templater and QuickAdd
releases.name: Datestamp v1.0.0
